creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #25)

Hello,

> Could you open an PR or a pull request for those changes at upstream?
> It would be nice to have it documented.

I previously said I would do this, however, I am well over Surveillance Capitalism and the struggle to reduce my exposure to it, on top of the absurd workflow that GitHub brings, to an already laughable dumpster fire that is git(1), I will not be pursuing this for the time being. Sorry compas.
